communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Memorandum of Understandings, contracts, and data sharing agreements with other agencies, including Customs and Border Protection, related to the access and participation in the Imperial County Regional ALPR Program that the department participates in. 

Invoices for any ALPRs purchased using Operation Stonegarden grant money.
Invoices for the installations of ALPRs using Operation Stonegarden grant money.
Invoices for the permitting costs of installing ALPRs using Operation Stonegarden grant money. 
Permitting documents for the installation of ALPRs that either El Centro or CBP uses for the Imperial County Regional ALPR Program. 

Please search 2020 to today's date.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Joey Scott
